content.full_text:
August 7, 1991

Attn: John Wallace
Fair Political Practices Comm.
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95804

Mr. Wallace,

Per our final conversation today, I am requesting written confirmation of your OK for us to run a unified political campaign for the Goleta Water District board election.

I hope we can receive this confirmation quickly as we are announcing our candidates' intentions at a press conference tomorrow. We have not received $1000 in campaign contributions yet, but that could happen soon, and we will need to file opening statements with the FPPC within 10 days after that happens.

Thanks very much for all of the attention you have given this matter. As you know, reporting rules are sometimes confusing (to say the least), and I would like to be sure we are complying.

Sincerely,

[Signature]
Susan Bott
P.O. Box 2483
Goleta, CA 93118
